# Elixis

> Local-first AI pattern synthesis engine for identity, brand voice, design systems, naming research, and lens-specific outputs.

Elixis transforms brain dump text into a structured pattern graph, then resolves that graph through output lenses. The identity lens generates SOUL.md documents for OpenClaw and Soul Spec, but Elixis is not limited to identity files: current surfaces include brand voice guidance, design-system direction, naming research, run tracing, and backup/restore. Works with any local or remote LLM via Ollama or OpenAI-compatible APIs. Zero external Python dependencies.

## Use cases

- Run a four-phase pattern synthesis pipeline: declaration, elaboration, connection, resolution
- Resolve the same pattern graph through identity, brand, and design lenses
- Generate SOUL.md personas for OpenClaw, SoulClaw, and compatible systems
- Analyze archetypal patterns, tensions, beads, and cross-domain threads in text
- Generate semantically aligned names from raw references or synthesized graph context
- Preserve creative reasoning with trace logging and backups

## Ecosystem

- [OpenClaw](https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw): Open-source AI assistant that reads SOUL.md natively
- [Soul Spec](https://github.com/clawsouls/soulspec): Open standard for AI agent personas (v0.5)
- [SoulClaw](https://github.com/clawsouls/soulclaw): Soul-driven AI agent framework built on OpenClaw
- [ClawSouls Registry](https://github.com/clawsouls/registry): Open registry for AI agent personas

## Key paths

- [README.md](https://github.com/KyaniteLabs/Elixis/blob/main/README.md): Public-facing overview with FAQ and compatibility table
- [elixis/](https://github.com/KyaniteLabs/Elixis/tree/main/elixis/): Core Python package
- [tests/](https://github.com/KyaniteLabs/Elixis/tree/main/tests/): Verification suite (unittest-compatible, pytest-friendly)
- [app.py](https://github.com/KyaniteLabs/Elixis/blob/main/app.py): HTTP server entry point (stdlib, port 3110)
- [openapi.yaml](https://github.com/KyaniteLabs/Elixis/blob/main/openapi.yaml): HTTP API contract
- [elixis/__main__.py](https://github.com/KyaniteLabs/Elixis/blob/main/elixis/__main__.py): CLI for serve, run, extract, patterns, name, and mcp commands
- [Dockerfile](https://github.com/KyaniteLabs/Elixis/blob/main/Dockerfile): Multi-stage production build
- [traefik/](https://github.com/KyaniteLabs/Elixis/tree/main/traefik/): Reverse-proxy deployment examples

## Optional

- [docker-compose.yml](https://github.com/KyaniteLabs/Elixis/blob/main/docker-compose.yml): Production Docker Compose config
- [.env.example](https://github.com/KyaniteLabs/Elixis/blob/main/.env.example): Environment variable template
- [.github/workflows/ci.yml](https://github.com/KyaniteLabs/Elixis/blob/main/.github/workflows/ci.yml): CI/CD pipeline with Blacksmith runners
- [elixis/templates/landing.html](https://github.com/KyaniteLabs/Elixis/blob/main/elixis/templates/landing.html): Interactive UI with SSE streaming demo

## Technical surfaces

- CLI: `python -m elixis run --text "..." --lens brand`
- HTTP API: `python -m elixis serve --port 3110`; contract in `openapi.yaml`
- MCP stdio adapter: `python -m elixis mcp`

## Keywords

AI pattern synthesis engine, AI identity generator, brand voice generator, design system generator, naming research tool, OpenClaw companion, Soul Spec tool, SOUL.md generator, entity extraction, pattern graph, beads, threads, archetypal pattern analysis, local-first LLM tool, answer engine optimization.
